content:
man this weeks been rough. i need to catch a w before its over or im gonna lose it. nothing has gone right thus far. work has been just shit, got a failing grade on one of my uni submissions, classes have been just shit, group project's team vibes are foul, and im behind schedule on my submission for next friday.

i just found this this album though, which sounds p cool, don cab vibes. also finally got this site running with github. working on this has been quite fun! reminds me of when i'd spend hours on my club penguin igloo or fine tuning my mal profile. this is about as much time as i should spend on it though...

can't stop adding shit to the website, it's so much fun! need to get my uni shit done tho... wonder for how long this enthusiasm will last

album of the day

.

finally wrap up this week. been absolute shit. and i have a massive list of things to do for uni next week. future me problem. rn im just gonna chug some wine and commit n push this bitch, the one thing that has worked out this week.

happy labour day! day went ok, got done like 1.5/15 things i need to get done... on the flip side got to hang with the lads and my monitor/tablet revived! power cable got fucked, so nothing serious thankfully. drinking some wine rn and gonna add more shit to the website. crazy that i've found joy on this as something to do late at night when i dont wanna go to bed. def a great replacement for unranked. as always, album of the day
